overall.description: Third-person gameplay from Red Dead Redemption 2 depicting a character in a bayou swamp campsite. The character walks along the water's edge, interacts with a campsite table to pick up and drink from a bucket, sits down to rest, and transitions to a close-up skinning animation. The setting features Spanish moss-draped cypress trees, still water, and golden morning light.

scene_state.functional_zone: bayou lakeshore with tall grass and cypress trees

agents.ego_description: walking along the swampy lakeshore through tall grass toward a campsite

entered.detail: calm reflective water of the bayou
tall cypress trees with Spanish moss
leafless dead trees in the swamp

segments.scene_description: The character walks through tall grass along the edge of a calm bayou. Spanish moss hangs from cypress trees in the background while morning sunlight filters through the canopy, illuminating the swampy shoreline.

scene_state.functional_zone: woodland campsite with cooking table and supplies

events.description: character picks up metal bucket from wooden camp table

agents.ego_description: approaching the campsite table and interacting with objects on it

entered.detail: rustic wooden table with cooking supplies
metal pail sitting on the table
wooden storage crate on the ground

segments.scene_description: The character arrives at a rustic campsite featuring a wooden table with a metal bucket. The camera stops near the table as the character picks up the bucket, with the lake now visible in the background to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: campsite interior near canvas tarp shelter

events.description: character drinks from the metal bucket
character walks to sitting position near the canvas tarp

agents.ego_description: drinking from the bucket then walking to a sitting spot near the tarp shelter

entered.detail: slanted canvas tarp shelter tied between trees

segments.scene_description: After drinking from the bucket, the character walks deeper into the campsite toward a canvas tarp shelter. The wooden table recedes into the background as the character approaches a sitting spot near the tarp.

scene_state.functional_zone: campsite seating area with dead trees silhouetted against sun

events.description: character sits down on the ground near the tarp

agents.ego_description: sitting on the ground at the campsite looking around the bayou environment

segments.scene_description: The character sits down near the canvas tarp, with the camera panning slowly to show the surrounding dead cypress trees silhouetted against the bright morning sun. The scene is still and contemplative.

scene_state.functional_zone: close-up skinning interaction with animal carcass

events.description: camera transitions to extreme close-up of hands skinning an animal

agents.ego_description: skinning an animal carcass with a knife in close-up view

entered.detail: character's gloved hands holding a skinning knife

segments.scene_description: The view shifts dramatically to an extreme close-up of the character's hands skinning an animal carcass with a knife. The background environment is completely obscured by the tight framing on the crafting action.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a serene bayou campsite that transitions from a wide environmental exploration to an intimate, focused close-up. It begins with the character walking through tall grass along a calm shoreline, where morning sunlight filters through cypress trees draped in Spanish moss. As the character reaches a rustic campsite, the camera pauses by a wooden table to capture the action of drinking from a metal bucket before following the character deeper toward a canvas tarp shelter. The scene then opens up as the character sits, with the camera panning to reveal dead cypress trees silhouetted against the bright sun, creating a still and contemplative atmosphere. Finally, the view shifts dramatically into an extreme close-up of the character's hands skinning an animal carcass, completely obscuring the surrounding swamp in favor of the detailed crafting action.
